note: Scratch arm policy with one continuous kinematic motion reward plus a signed roll-delta lock: no explicit standing posture angle, no low-speed still threshold, dominant-foot lateral displacement raises only the opposite arm. Command: KinematicScratchLegOpp: checkpoint=null; old shoulder style and arm energy rewards disabled; pitch target from abs(vx_cmd)*left-right foot x distance; side roll uses dominant lateral foot delta plus left_roll+right_roll lock so right leg outward -> left arm and left leg outward -> right arm.
